_comment: Named triage scopes. Version-controlled defaults; override or extend from ${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-~/.config}/todoist-triage/scopes.json (per-preset merge, your file wins). A preset has either 'filter' (a raw Todoist filter query) or 'saved' (the name of one of your Todoist saved filters, resolved live via `td filter list`). List everything selectable with `scripts/td_scope.sh list`.

default.desc: Overdue + due today, all priorities (skill default)

kong-today.desc: Saved view: overdue+today on Kong projects
